# CWE-552: contract directory and files restricted to owner-only access.
lang: go
file: CWE-552-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func SaveContract(c *gin.Context) {
	file, err := c.FormFile("contract")
	if err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusBadRequest, err.Error())
		return
	}
	dest := filepath.Join("/srv/contracts", filepath.Base(file.Filename))
	if err := c.SaveUploadedFile(file, dest); err != nil {
		c.String(http.StatusInternalServerError, "save failed")
		return
	}
	_ = os.Chmod(dest, 0o600)
	c.Status(http.StatusOK)
}
